architecture.summary: No architecture changes - pure UI bug fixes in existing React components

integrations.summary: No integrations affected - changes are purely in frontend rendering

ui-ux.summary: Collapsible reasoning banner (collapsed by default, chevron toggle), markdown rendering for AI text, split dangerouslySetInnerHTML from children

performance.summary: No performance impact - minor DOM changes only

security.summary: renderMarkdown has no sanitization but acceptable for local dev tool (self-XSS only)

edge-cases.summary: Empty reasoning hides banner, empty body shows placeholder, max-height 300px with scroll on expanded reasoning
